items.title: Hawks drafted Zuby Ejiofor in first round this year and Asa Newell in first round last year. Now add first round value at 52 with Henri Veesaar.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: Hawks drafted Zuby Ejiofor in first round this year and Asa Newell in first round last year. Now add first round value at 52 with Henri Veesaar.
